title: [EIL] Define SRDB entries for all M8 subsystems
body:
## Objective
Define SRDB canonical parameter names, units, valid ranges and PUS mappings for all M8 subsystems.

## Subsystems
- OBC: mode, OBT, watchdog, memory
- PCDU: bus voltage, LCL currents, MPPT state
- BAT: reuse existing eps.battery.*
- SA: reuse existing eps.solar_array.*
- RW: reuse existing aocs.rw1.* — extend for temperature
- ST: quaternion (×4), validity, mode, temperature, sun_angle
- SBT: uplink_lock, downlink_active, mode, signal_level

## Acceptance Criteria
- srdb/baseline/dhs.yaml: OBC parameters
- srdb/baseline/aocs.yaml: extended with ST, GYRO, CSS entries
- srdb/baseline/ttc.yaml: extended with SBT parameters
- All files load cleanly via SrdbLoader
- PUS mappings consistent with ECSS PUS-C service catalogue

## Implements
SVF-DEV-091

title: [EIL] Implement OBC reference model
body:
## Objective
Implement a realistic OBC NativeEquipment model with mode management, watchdog, and on-board time.

## Physics
- Mode state machine: SAFE -> NOMINAL -> PAYLOAD
- On-board time (OBT): monotonic counter in seconds
- Watchdog timer: resets if not kicked within period, generates event
- Mass memory: fills over time, dump command empties it
- Already implements PUS TC routing (M7 ObcEquipment) — extend it

## Ports
- IN: mode_cmd, watchdog_kick, memory_dump_cmd
- OUT: mode, obt, watchdog_status, memory_used_pct, health

## Acceptance Criteria
- Mode transitions triggered by TC
- OBT increments each tick
- Watchdog timeout generates S5 event
- Unit tests cover all mode transitions and watchdog

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038

title: [EIL] Implement PCDU reference model
body:
## Objective
Extend the existing PCDU model with per-LCL switching, MPPT, and UVLO protection.

## Physics
- Per-LCL current monitoring and switching (8 LCLs minimum)
- MPPT: simplified — track peak power point based on illumination
- UVLO: disconnect loads below minimum battery voltage
- Power accounting: generated - consumed = net to/from battery

## Ports
- IN: solar_power, battery_voltage, load_power, lcl_enable[1-8]
- OUT: bus_voltage, charge_current, lcl_status[1-8], total_load

## Acceptance Criteria
- LCL switching responds to TC within one tick
- UVLO disconnects loads below threshold
- MPPT increases efficiency vs fixed-point model
- Unit tests cover LCL switching, UVLO, MPPT

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038

title: [EIL] Implement Star Tracker reference model
body:
## Objective
Implement a realistic star tracker NativeEquipment model with quaternion output, noise, blinding, and acquisition time.

## Physics
- Internal attitude propagator: constant-rate rotation from initial quaternion
- Measurement noise: white noise + bias on quaternion components
- Sun blinding: output invalid when sun angle < threshold (default 30 deg)
- Acquisition: N seconds from cold start before first valid output
- Temperature: rises under operation, affects noise level

## Ports
- IN: sun_angle (deg), power_enable, mode_cmd
- OUT: quaternion_w, quaternion_x, quaternion_y, quaternion_z,
       validity, mode, temperature, acquisition_progress

## Interface type: SpaceWire (primary), MIL1553_RT (secondary)

## Acceptance Criteria
- Quaternion output has realistic noise characteristics
- Validity flag goes False when sun_angle < threshold
- Acquisition time modelled correctly
- Unit tests cover blinding, acquisition, noise

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038

title: [EIL] Implement S-Band Transponder reference model
body:
## Objective
Implement a realistic S-Band transponder NativeEquipment model.

## Physics
- Uplink: carrier lock/unlock based on signal level input
- Downlink: active/inactive based on mode
- Mode state machine: IDLE -> RANGING -> TC_RX -> TM_TX
- TC forwarding: received TC bytes forwarded to OBC
- TM transmission: TM packets from OBC transmitted when in TM_TX mode

## Ports
- IN: uplink_signal_level (dBm), mode_cmd, power_enable
- OUT: uplink_lock, downlink_active, mode, rx_bitrate, tx_bitrate

## Acceptance Criteria
- Lock/unlock transitions based on signal threshold
- Mode transitions triggered by TC
- Unit tests cover lock, unlock, mode transitions

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038

title: [EIL] Extend RW model with temperature and bearing friction
body:
## Objective
Extend the existing ReactionWheel model with temperature modelling and bearing friction.

## Physics
- Bearing friction: speed-dependent drag (Coulomb + viscous)
- Temperature: rises with speed squared, cools when idle
- Speed saturation: hard limit at MAX_SPEED_RPM
- Over-temperature protection: reduce torque above threshold

## New ports
- OUT: temperature (degC)

## Acceptance Criteria
- Temperature rises under sustained operation
- Bearing friction correctly decelerates wheel when torque=0
- Over-temperature protection reduces speed
- Unit tests cover friction, temperature, protection

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038

title: [EIL] Define equipment requirements [OBC], [PCDU], [ST], [SBT], [RW]
body:
## Objective
Define functional requirements for each M8 equipment model, following the same pattern as [EPS] and [1553] in REQUIREMENTS.md.

## New functional areas
- [OBC]: 8-10 requirements covering mode management, OBT, watchdog
- [PCDU]: 6-8 requirements covering LCL switching, MPPT, UVLO
- [ST]: 6-8 requirements covering quaternion, blinding, acquisition
- [SBT]: 4-6 requirements covering uplink lock, mode transitions
- [RW]: extend existing with temperature and friction requirements

## Acceptance Criteria
- All requirements added to REQUIREMENTS.md
- Every requirement has a corresponding test
- checkcov shows zero unexpected gaps
- Traceability index updated

## Implements
SVF-DEV-072, SVF-DEV-073

title: [EIL] Write integration test campaign for full platform simulation
body:
## Objective
Write an end-to-end integration test campaign that exercises all M8 models together in a realistic platform simulation scenario.

## Scenario: spacecraft safe mode recovery
1. Spacecraft starts in SAFE mode (low power, CSS active)
2. CSS detects sun, SA generates power, PCDU charges battery
3. OBC transitions to NOMINAL mode
4. ST acquires attitude
5. RW commanded to detumble
6. SBT establishes uplink contact
7. Ground sends mode command via PUS TC

## Acceptance Criteria
- Campaign YAML: campaigns/platform_validation.yaml
- All test procedures pass
- HTML report generated cleanly
- Full traceability to OBC/PCDU/ST/SBT/RW requirements

## Implements
SVF-DEV-050, SVF-DEV-051
